author: govinda d膩sa
verses:
vande giri鈰卾ara鈰卍hara鈰卲ada鈰卥amalam
kamal膩kara鈰卥amal膩帽citamamalam

dhvaja鈰卾ajr膩峁卥u艣a鈰卲a峁卥aja鈰卥alitam
vraja鈰卾anit膩鈰卥uca鈰卥u峁卥uma鈰卨alitam

ma帽jula鈰卪a峁噄鈰卬奴pura鈰卹ama峁嚹珁am
acapala鈰卥ula鈰卹ama峁嚹媴kaman墨yam

atilohitamatirohita鈰卋h膩峁m
madhu鈰卪adhup墨k峁泃a鈰単ovinda鈰卍膩sam
en_translation:
I worship the lotus feet of the Holder of the mountain, which are spotlessly adorned by the Goddess of Fortune.

They are marked with the flag, thunderbolt, elephant goad, and lotus, and are beautiful with the saffron paste from the breasts of the women of Vraja.

They are charming with beautiful jeweled anklets and are desirable even to the most steady and noble women.

They are very reddish in color and have a very mysterious nature, making Govinda D膩sa into a honeybee enchanted by Their sweetness.
